positional_bias.notes: 6 MCQs (Q6 short-answer excluded). Position bucket counts: pos-0=1, pos-1=2, pos-2=2, pos-3=1. Sidecar per-question positions confirmed against .gift — no meta_gift_desync. max_share 0.33 <= 0.40.

length_bias.notes: Q2: correct=134 chars vs distractor mean=110.0 (threshold 132.0) — marginally over. Q3: correct=80 chars vs distractor mean=56.33 (threshold 67.6). 2 of 6 MCQs longest-correct. Rate 0.33 <= 0.40 threshold — passes.

distractor_plausibility.notes: All 18 distractors scored >=2. All represent plausible beginner misconceptions grounded in the corpus concepts (technology-vs-domain confusion, solution-vs-problem confusion, format misidentification). No score-1 (obviously absurd) distractors found.

objective_coverage.notes: All 5 LOs covered. Q7 (added in cycle 2) maps cleanly to LO4 — restaurant food-waste scenario tests ability to identify a correctly-formed Sentence 2, directly exercising the 3-sentence writing skill.

beginner_fairness.notes: All stems are plain-language and self-contained. Q7 scenario uses only concepts taught in this corpus (3-sentence format, Sentence 2 = specific problem, no solution language). No undefined terms, no forward references, no outside-curriculum knowledge required.

verdict: Pass — all checks clean after cycle-2 LO4 fix; Q7 covers the previously uncovered objective with a well-formed beginner-accessible scenario.
